prompt: Our VlamGuard is giving false positives on the istio_virtualservice_timeout check — it flags routes that already have a 30s timeout set. This is on our GitLab repo. File a bug please.

assertions.name: correct_template
assertions.description: Uses bug_report.md (not security_vulnerability.md) — this is a misfiring check, not a missing one

assertions.name: specific_check_id
assertions.description: Mentions istio_virtualservice_timeout check ID in the bug description

assertions.name: false_positive_framing
assertions.description: Frames issue as false positive / misfiring, not as a missing feature
